customCss: [data-store-presentation=immersive] { --ease-out-expo: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } [data-store-presentation=immersive] .store-fade-up { animation-timing-function: var(--ease-out-expo); animation-duration: 0.7s; } [data-store-presentation=immersive] .store-fade-in { animation-timing-function: var(--ease-out-expo); animation-duration: 0.5s; } [data-store-presentation=immersive] header { backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--store-background) 85%, transparent); border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--store-line) 40%, transparent); } [data-store-presentation=immersive] footer { background-color: var(--store-primary); color: var(--store-background); } [data-store-presentation=immersive] footer a { color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--store-background) 60%, transparent); } [data-store-presentation=immersive] footer a:hover { color: var(--store-background); } [data-store-presentation=immersive] main { position: relative; } [data-store-presentation=immersive] main::before { content: ""; position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(91,51,39,0.06), transparent 34%), linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(250,246,241,0), rgba(236,223,207,0.06)); z-index: -1; }

footer.title: El Piombino
footer.description: Cafetería, pastelería y restaurante en Lima. Tres locales para disfrutar.

catalog.categoriesDescription: Elige una categoría para explorar nuestro menú.
catalog.emptyTitle: No hay productos en esta categoría
catalog.emptyDescription: Prueba con otra categoría o busca directamente.

cart.emptyDescription: Explora nuestra carta y agrega lo que más te guste.
